response.justification: A seasoned full-stack engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends, plus strong TypeScript/Node and some AWS (CDK) experience. However, the role centers on production GenAI: 8+ years shipping AI solutions, RAG, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks, and customer-facing technical discovery. The resume shows only recent, lightly-described AI exposure (MCP code generators, agentic tooling at re:cinq since 2025) and no demonstrated RAG, vector DB, or multi-agent framework work, no Python, and no clear forward-deployed/customer-facing leadership. Strong engineer, but a weak match for the specialized GenAI staff profile.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience (15+ years) with strong TypeScript/Node.js and AWS CDK
Recent hands-on exposure to MCP and agentic workflow tooling
Demonstrated technical leadership: workshops, mentoring, TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years shipping production AI solutions, RAG, or vector databases
No Python listed and no multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) experience
